---
title: "Caleb Mogyabiyedom"
image: photo.JPG
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/caleb-mogyabiyedom-0a3715275/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/elevenw11se
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:koficaleb11@gmail.com
---

## **Caleb Mogyabiyedom**

### *Economics × Data Science × Financial Markets*

> I use data to analyze markets, evaluate investments, and uncover insights—especially in emerging economies.

---

📊 **What I Do**
- Financial & Macroeconomic Analysis  
- Data-Driven Decision Making  
- Real Estate & Market Research  

🌍 **Focus Areas**
- Emerging Markets  
- Investment Analysis  
- Economic Strategy  

---

🚀 **Featured Work**
- Ghana Macroeconomic Dashboard  
- Accra Rental Market Analysis  
- Labor Force Participation Study  

👉 Explore my work in the **Data Viz** tab above.
